name: lily-design-system-react-helpers
description: Lily Design System - React 19 helpers catalog (dev/test harness)

scripts.build: for d in lily-design-system-react-*/; do d=${d%/}; [ -f "$d/index.ts" ] || continue; tsup "$d/index.ts" --format esm --dts --out-dir "$d/dist" --external react --external react-dom; done

author: joel@joelparkerhenderson.com
